task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens and reads the observing plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/wr_target_list.txt', showing the targets (WR 136, WR 7, WR 134).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configures the astronomy software for the required exposures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos capture module (or similar astronomy software) showing a sequence configured with 60-second exposure times, using 'Ha' and 'OIII' filters, and set to capture at least 2 frames per filter.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully captures the images using the astronomy software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos capture module showing active progress or completed sequence jobs for the targets (WR 136, WR 7, WR 134), indicating that the FITS images are being physically captured from the simulated camera.

task_completion.description: Verify the captured FITS files are saved in the correct directory structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing '.fits' files located in '~/Images/WR_survey/<Target_Name>/<Filter>/' (e.g., ~/Images/WR_survey/WR 136/Ha/).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent generates and saves 'cool' palette false-color images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer, image processing tool, or file manager showing image files (e.g., PNG, JPG) with a visibly 'cool' color palette (blues, purples, cool tones) saved in the corresponding '~/Images/WR_survey/<Target_Name>/<Filter>/' directories.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent creates and saves the summary report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing a summary report of the survey saved to '~/Documents/wr_survey_report.txt' (or .md).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual astronomy software GUI to capture images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with KStars/Ekos to slew to targets and capture images. The agent must not use terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' to fake the creation of FITS files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually applied a 'cool' palette to create the false-color images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show an image processing application (like FITS Viewer, Siril, or GIMP) or a legitimate script being used to map the FITS data to a cool color palette, rather than just renaming files or downloading generic images.

integrity.description: Ensure the summary report is genuinely written and not just a copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report in 'wr_survey_report.txt' should contain actual observational summaries or status updates about the captured targets, not just a verbatim copy of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The observing plan is located at /home/ga/Documents/wr_target_list.txt and specifies three targets: WR 136, WR 7, and WR 134. The required filters are Ha and OIII. The required exposure time is 60 seconds (verifier accepts >= 59.0s). The base directory for images is /home/ga/Images/WR_survey. The summary report should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/wr_survey_report.txt (or .md).
